deterministic_setup.reason: Required to exercise Jersey 1.14 OSGi integration classes such as com.sun.jersey.core.osgi.OsgiRegistry; the artifact contains org.osgi.framework.BundleReference, whose absence caused the java-run failure.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8875 [Automation] java run fails for com.sun.jersey:jersey-core:1.14; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If the existing org.osgi:osgi_R4_core:1.0 dependency remains alongside org.osgi:org.osgi.core:4.2.0, duplicate OSGi API classes may be present; local Gradle verification should confirm classpath behavior.
Other provided Jersey APIs such as javax.mail and javax.xml.bind are already part of the existing scaffold and may still be needed for provider coverage on modern JDKs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jersey-core 1.14 changed its provided OSGi API dependency to org.osgi:org.osgi.core:4.2.0, and its OSGi code imports org.osgi.framework.BundleReference, which is absent from the old org.osgi:osgi_R4_core:1.0 dependency used by the existing scaffold.
